meta.title: Shema Yisrael
meta.author: Moses
meta.tradition_notes: Deuteronomy 6:4-5, the foundational declaration of monotheistic faith. Quoted by Jesus as the greatest commandment (Mark 12:29). Jewish in origin, foundational to Christian theology.

provenance.notes: Proof texts from Creeds.json are already in OSIS format -- raw and osis fields are identical. Content used as canonical text; ContentWithProofs preserved as content_with_proofs.

units.content: Hear, O Israel: The LORD our God, the LORD is one. You shall love the LORD your God with all your heart and with all your soul and with all your might.
units.content_with_proofs: Hear, O Israel: The LORD our God, the LORD is one. You shall love the LORD your God with all your heart and with all your soul and with all your might.[1]
